forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h increasing to 40 to 55 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h in the early morning then increasing to 35 to 50 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the south. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h increasing to 35 to 50 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h turning westerly 35 to 55 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south at night. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds west to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h increasing to 55 km/h before turning southwesterly 35 to 50 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm at night. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Damaging winds possible near the coast. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding near the coast. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Damaging winds possible near the coast. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely later tonight. Damaging winds possible in the west. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h in the late morning then decreasing to 20 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Damaging winds possible in the west. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h increasing to 35 to 55 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely at night. The chance of a thunderstorm. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly 35 to 50 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 35 to 50 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly during the day then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers east of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Streaky Bay. Damaging winds possible. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Streaky Bay in the evening. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the early morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 35 to 50 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds westerly 35 to 50 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Woomera in the late afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible south of Coober Pedy. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Damaging winds possible south of Woomera. Winds westerly 35 to 55 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of morning fog in the far west. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly clear. Medium chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, becoming less likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek. Damaging winds possible south of Yunta. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending west to northwesterly in the late evening.

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Yunta in the early morning. Damaging winds possible about the Gammon Ranges. Winds west to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h becoming westerly 35 to 55 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 21.
